description: The LegacyAlignmentSizingAdapter component is used in converted legacy particle systems that were converted to PhotonDust as part of The Performance Updates.

fields.LengthScale: The original length scale from legacy content.
fields.VelocityScale: The original velocity scale from legacy content.
fields.Alignment: The original alignment from legacy content.
fields.ParticleMesh: The particle mesh this is using.
fields.UsingStretch: ``LengthScale``, ``VelocityScale``, and ``Alignment`` are used to generate this value, and can be used in PhotonDust.
fields.RotationSimulator: ``LengthScale``, ``VelocityScale``, and ``Alignment`` are used to generate the drive value for the target field specified in this, and is used to drive a field of the same name on another component in PhotonDust.
fields.OrientByVelocity: ``LengthScale``, ``VelocityScale``, and ``Alignment`` are used to generate the drive value for the target field specified in this, and is used to drive a field of the same name on another component in PhotonDust.
fields.PivotModule: ``LengthScale``, ``VelocityScale``, and ``Alignment`` are used to generate the drive value for the target field specified in this, and is used to drive a field of the same name on another component in PhotonDust.
fields.UseLocalRotation: ``LengthScale``, ``VelocityScale``, and ``Alignment`` are used to generate the drive value for the target field specified in this, and is used to drive a field of the same name on another component in PhotonDust.
fields.SizeModifierEnabled: ``LengthScale``, ``VelocityScale``, and ``Alignment`` are used to generate the drive value for the target field specified in this, and is used to drive a field of the same name on another component in PhotonDust.
fields.SizeOffsetByvelocityEnabled: ``LengthScale``, ``VelocityScale``, and ``Alignment`` are used to generate the drive value for the target field specified in this, and is used to drive a field of the same name on another component in PhotonDust.
fields.OrientUp: ``LengthScale``, ``VelocityScale``, and ``Alignment`` are used to generate the drive value for the target field specified in this, and is used to drive a field of the same name on another component in PhotonDust.
fields.LengthSizeMultiplier: ``LengthScale``, ``VelocityScale``, and ``Alignment`` are used to generate the drive value for the target field specified in this, and is used to drive a field of the same name on another component in PhotonDust.
fields.VelocitySizeMultiplier: ``LengthScale``, ``VelocityScale``, and ``Alignment`` are used to generate the drive value for the target field specified in this, and is used to drive a field of the same name on another component in PhotonDust.
fields.PivotMultiplier: ``LengthScale``, ``VelocityScale``, and ``Alignment`` are used to generate the drive value for the target field specified in this, and is used to drive a field of the same name on another component in PhotonDust.
fields.BillboardAlignment: ``LengthScale``, ``VelocityScale``, and ``Alignment`` are used to generate the drive value for the target field specified in this, and is used to drive a field of the same name on another component in PhotonDust.
fields.MeshAlignment: ``LengthScale``, ``VelocityScale``, and ``Alignment`` are used to generate the drive value for the target field specified in this, and is used to drive a field of the same name on another component in PhotonDust.

usage: Not used directly by the user. don't use this to make new content!
